name: teams-react-context
description: Create React context provider and hook for teams domain store
acceptanceCriteria: TeamsProvider creates store via useRef for stable instance
TeamsProvider calls initialize() on mount via useEffect
TeamsProvider cleans up subscriptions on unmount
useTeams() hook returns typed store instance
useTeams() throws helpful error when used outside TeamsProvider
Components wrapped in observer() re-render on store changes
